title: Wikipedia was in read-only mode following mass admin account compromise
author: greyface-
aiHeadline: Wikipedia, the place where knowledge goes to die, temporarily locked down after admins got hacked like it's 2005 all over again.

title: Judge orders government to begin refunding more than $130B in tariffs
author: JumpCrisscross
aiHeadline: Government finally decides to refund $130B in tariffs, but don't hold your breath—this could take another decade or two.

title: GPT-5.4
author: mudkipdev
aiHeadline: GPT-5.4 arrives, bringing you more of the same: lies, misinformation, and the occasional coherent sentence.

title: The L in "LLM" Stands for Lying
author: LorenDB
aiHeadline: LLMs are officially rebranded as 'Lying Language Models'—because who doesn't love a good fib?

title: No right to relicense this project
author: robin_reala
aiHeadline: Open-source project owner says, 'No, you can't relicense my code,' proving once again that developers are the real heroes.
